query: I've got a doc full of fragments about our Q3 postmortem — can you turn it into a blog post, one beat at a time?
Here's my raw research on urban beekeeping. Let's shape it into an article — show me a couple of ways to start before you write anything.
Can we draft this newsletter piece journey-style? I want to pick which direction it goes at each step instead of getting the whole thing at once.
I have a transcript of my interview with the founder. Turn it into a long-form piece, but don't write the whole thing — walk me through it beat by beat so I can steer.
go back and rewrite beat 3 of the onboarding article — open it with the complaint instead of the stat
my notes on the migration are a mess but there's good material in there. can you mine it into an article, choose-your-own-adventure style, and check in with me before each new section?
I want to co-write a post from these fragments — give me 2-3 ways to start, tell me what each one sets up, and I'll pick one.
we have a pile of raw material for the changelog explainer doc. draft it incrementally, checkpointing with me at each beat, not all at once please.
continue the beats article at drafts/beats-piece.md — what are the next couple of directions we could take it from here?
take this brain dump and turn it into a piece, but ground every term before you use it and stop after each move so I can react
can you just write me a complete draft of this article from my notes, no back-and-forth needed, just give me the whole thing?
mine these fragments and organize them into a clean structure, but I don't need it broken into beats — just shape it into paragraphs as you go
I don't have any material yet — can you interview me to help me figure out what I even want to write about?
can you proofread this article I already finished and tighten up the prose?
summarize this raw transcript into three bullet points for a meeting recap
fix the grammar and smooth out the flow in this blog post draft I wrote
what's a good outline structure for a technical article about database indexing? I don't have material together yet, just thinking out loud
can you write a python script that turns a folder of markdown files into a static site
can you fact-check this finished article against my raw research notes and flag anything unsupported?
I need help brainstorming topic ideas for next month's newsletter, nothing written down yet
